title: ageratina chiapensis
intro: Ageratina chiapensis, also known as Hierba de la Lagrima, is a plant species in the aster family, native to Mexico. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Ageratina chiapensis has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing digestive issues. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
intro_study: According to "Phytomedicine : international journal of phytotherapy and phytopharmacology", ageratina chiapensis has been shown to have promising results in the inhibition of inflammaging.
